title: Dreaming Rules for Golden Asset Distillation
description: Rules for the Nightly Distiller to ensure high-purity, executable assets enter MEMORY.md. Reference: Super Constitution §09

core_principles.name: 结论先行 (Conclusion First)
core_principles.description: Every asset MUST begin with the core conclusion/answer before any explanation. No preambles, no context-building.

core_principles.name: 代码简洁 (Code Simplicity)
core_principles.description: Code blocks must be minimal, self-contained, and immediately executable. No verbose comments, no redundant boilerplate.

rejected_patterns: // This is a comment explaining what the code does

core_principles.name: 特定 Schema (Schema Compliance)
core_principles.description: All distilled assets MUST include the [ASSET_V1.0] fingerprint in their header for traceability.

body_structure.section_3: 使用场景 (Usage) - When to apply this asset
body_structure.section_4: 注意事项 (Caveats) - Edge cases, pitfalls
